title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Reinforcement Learning. It opens into Rule-Based Reinforcement Learning and Value-Based Reinforcement Learning.
